title: 基于 stellar-theme 的个性化实践
content: 使用 NPM 安装 Stellar 后如何修改字体样式？在使用 Hexo 构建博客并安装 Stellar 主题的过程中，如果你使用了如下命令： 你可能会发现一个问题： 在 themes/ 文件夹下看不到 Stellar 主题的文件，无法直接修改模板或 CSS ，这是因为通过 NPM 安装主题的方式会将主题文件存放在项目的 node_modules/ 文件夹中，而不是 themes/ 下。 以 Stellar 为例，实际路径是：node_modules/hexo-theme-stellar/ 这种结构的好处是可以轻松升级主题，但缺点是无法直接修改主题文件（否则更新时改动就会被覆盖），因此，我们需要采用 Hexo 官方推荐的方式，用 _config.stellar.yml 来“注入”我们自己的样式，而不是直接改源码。 步骤一：添加自定义 CSS 文件 在你的博客根目录下，进入 source/css/ 文件夹，新建一个名为 custom.css 的文件。 📁 路径结构为：your-blog/source/css/custom.css 如果你没有 css/ 文件夹，请手动新建。 然后在 custom.css 中写入你想应用的字体，例如： 你也可以根据需要设置标题、正文、代码块等元素的字体。 步骤二：配置 _config.stellar.yml 文件 在博客根目录下，找到名为 _config.stellar.yml 的文件（注意不是 _config.yml）。 在这个配置文件的末尾添加以下内容： 这样，Stellar 会在生成页面时自动在 head 中引入你的自定义 CSS。 步骤三：生成博客预览效果 在命令行中依次输入： 打开浏览器访问 http://localhost:4000，你应该可以看到字体已生效。 通过 _config.stellar.yml 中的 inject 配置，我们无需修改主题源码，就可以优雅地为 Hexo Stellar 添加自定义样式。这种方式不仅安全，也利于后续主题更新维护。

title: Photography
content: Photography O1 2077年的小目标：完成 Volantis 6.0 并发布上线 来自2077年末的复盘：已《基本》实现目标 正常 44% KR1 重构 tag-plugins 和 wiki 系统 当 KR 进度为 100% 时，标签默认显示为 已完成当 KR 未设置进度时，默认为 0%当 O 未设置进度时，则显示所有 KR 进度平均值 已完成 100% KR2 完成主要页面设计稿 小提示1小提示2您可以在 _config.yml 文件中修改标签的颜色和文案您可以在 _config.yml 文件中增加任意的标签配置 延期 90% KR3 完成前置准备工作（如果你知道答案，请在留言区帮帮我！🥹） 在咸水和海滩之间找一亩地求出圆周率后15位找出宇宙的终极逻辑去地狱里走两步 未完成 -12% KR-4 开发、测试和发布 支持嵌套插入图片等其它简单组件 风险 0% @tianhao_wang@eberhard@eberhard@eberhard@eberhard@vklemen

title: 关于
content: NexAbout me 关于我 关于博客 Welcome to my digital sanctuary—a space where thoughts converge, experiments unfold, and creativity takes shape. Compared to the immediacy and fragmentation of social media, this space focuses more on depth and the purity of expression. On platforms like Moments or QQ Space, content is often subjected to restrictions and censorship, which undoubtedly compresses the freedom of expression. Blogs, on the other hand, offer creators a greater sense of autonomy. Here, there are no complex rules, nor are there gray exclamation marks signaling content that might disappear at any moment. “The fate of expression does not lie in being understood.” Some words simply need to be said, even if no one is listening. Moreover, blogs have a unique charm in their medium. Moments and QQ Space rely on a passive, unsolicited stream of information. Blogs, however, are different—they require active visits and a deliberate pause to listen attentively. This “sense of ritual” imbues them with more weight, making the act of expression feel more earnest and free. As for the content of this site, I plan to write about things that interest me, including but not limited to technical learning notes, photography projects, personal insights, and casual musings from daily life. The content here can be seen as a superset of the updates I might post on Moments or QQ Space (of course, whether it’s this blog, QQ Space, Moments, or even my photo album, they are all subsets of my life). I hope these entries won’t just be cold collections of information but can also provide some inspiration to you, the reader. PS: As I feel I am currently in a period of intense learning and still lack the ability to produce high-quality content, updates to this blog may not be very frequent. 评论与交流 At the bottom of articles or pages, you can leave comments to interact and communicate with me. The comment system is powered by Giscus, utilizing GitHub Discussions. To post a comment, you need to authorize your GitHub account. Note ⚠️: Please refrain from posting meaningless spam comments, advertisements, or similar content, as they will be considered junk comments. Do not attempt penetration testing. If you have suggestions or feedback regarding the blog’s content, layout, or design, feel free to contact me via email or leave a comment.
